recommended_paths: Address the sizing polish on the compact radius control, then proceed.
exact_next_step: Record reviewer resolutions in the governing TODO using the machine-checkable resolution table or equivalent gate ledger, then extract the derived resolution packet and decide whether another bounded review pass is still required.

findings.title: Compact radius badge sizing appears tuned to a specific label width
findings.rationale: The package explicitly says the compact geometry was widened enough for `50 km`. That suggests the layout may still be coupled to one representative string instead of the full supported range of distance labels or locales, which makes the affordance less elegant and more brittle.
findings.suggested_action: Replace the width tweak with content-aware constraints or a measured max-width strategy, then verify the compact state against the longest supported distance labels on narrow phones.
